chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Acq. Appeal No. 303 of 2025. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. for orders on M.A. No.6076 of 2025. 2. For orders on M.A. No.6077 of 2025. 3. For orders on M.A. No.5879 of 2025. 4. For orders on Office Objection. 5. For orders on M.A. No.5880 of 2025. 6. For hearing of Main Case. 05.05.2025. Mr. Muhammad Iddress Malik, advocate for the appellant. ************ 1. Urgency granted. The learned counsel for the appellant submits that under instructions from his client, he does not press the instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal. Accordingly, it stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). J U D G E Manthar Brohi
